source: msats_nmi_location_23516 = False
%run "DataHubBatchScripts/DEVELOPMENT_TOOLS/get_feature_flags"

#Imports
import json

from pyspark.sql.functions import hash
from pyspark.sql import functions as fn
from pyspark.sql.functions import col, concat, lit, to_timestamp,current_timestamp,date_format,from_utc_timestamp
from pyspark.sql.functions import sha2, concat_ws

from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, StringType, IntegerType, BooleanType,DateType, DoubleType,TimestampType

from py4j.protocol import Py4JJavaError

#Get Parameters from controldb
db_port = 1433
linked_service_name = "LS_SQL_ELTFrameworkDB"
db_notebookname= "AEMO_MSATS_Silver"
lake_db_name = "aemo_silver"
linkedServiceProperties = json.loads(mssparkutils.credentials.getPropertiesAll(linked_service_name))
sql_server_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Endpoint')
db_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Database')
#print(linkedServiceProperties)
access_token = mssparkutils.credentials.getConnectionStringOrCreds(linked_service_name)

#Get load meta from controldb

db_query ="SELECT A.*,B.NotebookParameterId,B.ParameterType,B.Value  FROM [CTL].[CFG_NOTEBOOK] A LEFT JOIN [CTL].[CFG_NOTEBOOK_PARAMETER] B ON A.NotebookId = B.NotebookId"

df = spark.read.format("jdbc") \
    .option("url", "jdbc:sqlserver://%s:%s" % (sql_server_name, db_port)) \
    .option("query", db_query) \
    .option("accessToken", access_token) \
    .option("encrypt", "true") \
    .option("databaseName", db_name) \
    .option("hostNameInCertificate", "*.database.windows.net") \
    .load()

#Join cfg_notebook and cfg_notebook_parameter tables to retrieve source & target meta from controldb

df2 = df.where(df.NotebookPath==db_notebookname)

#Destination DataLake storage details
destination_storage = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_storage').collect()[0]["Value"] #Storage name
destination_container = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_container').collect()[0]["Value"] #raw storage container details
destination_path = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_path').collect()[0]["Value"] #raw delta file path

#Get Current Date
Date_Collection = spark.sql("select current_timestamp() AS Current,(current_timestamp() + interval '-1' second) AS EndDate").collect()
Silver_LoadDate = Date_Collection[0]['Current']
Silver_UpdateEndDate = Date_Collection[0]['EndDate']

# Display values
print(destination_storage)
print(destination_container)
print(destination_path)

# Create AEMO Dir if it does not exist
dirs_in_silver =  [f.name for f in mssparkutils.fs.ls(f"abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/")]
if "AEMO" not in dirs_in_silver:
    mssparkutils.fs.mkdirs(f"abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/AEMO")

# Create MSATS Dir if it does not exist 
dirs_in_aemo =  [f.name for f in mssparkutils.fs.ls(f"abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/AEMO")]

if "MSATS" not in dirs_in_aemo:
    mssparkutils.fs.mkdirs(f"abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/AEMO/MSATS")
#  Table: **nmi_loss_factor**: START

#Set table name
db_tablename="nmi_loss_factor"
Bronze_tablename="msats_nmi_data"
Bronze_notebookname="aemo_bronze"

#Create Bronze Table
spark.sql(f"""CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS {lake_db_name};""")
spark.sql(f"""
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename}
(
	ParticipantId STRING,
	SequenceNumber INT,
	CreationDate TIMESTAMP,
	CreationDate_D TIMESTAMP,
	MaintenanceDate TIMESTAMP,
	MaintenanceDate_D TIMESTAMP,
	RowStatus STRING,
	ValidFrom TIMESTAMP,
	ValidFrom_D TIMESTAMP,
	ValidTo TIMESTAMP,
	ValidTo_D TIMESTAMP,
	NMI STRING,
	NMIHashId STRING,
	TNI STRING,
	DLFCode STRING,
	Status STRING,
	FileName STRING,
    CDCLoadDate TIMESTAMP,
    CDCStartDate TIMESTAMP,
    CDCEndDate TIMESTAMP,
    CDCOps INT,
    CDCCurrentFlag BOOLEAN,
    HashKey STRING,
    HashDiff STRING  
)
USING delta
LOCATION 'abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{destination_path}/{db_tablename}'

# Row count parameters
Silver_Insert_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 1 """).collect()[0][0]
Silver_Update_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 2 """).collect()[0][0]
Silver_Delete_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 0 """).collect()[0][0]

# Create a temporary view
spark.sql(f"""
    CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW 
       Silver_temp_{db_tablename}
    AS
        (
            WITH Numbered_Rows_R AS (
                SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ParticipantId,NMI,FromDate ORDER BY CreationDate desc) AS RecordRank
                FROM {Bronze_notebookname}.{Bronze_tablename}
                WHERE CDCLoadDate > '{silver_loaddate}'
                )
                , Numbered_Rows_S AS (
                    SELECT  *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ParticipantId,SequenceNumber ORDER BY MaintenanceDate) AS SequenceRank
                    FROM Numbered_Rows_R
                    WHERE RecordRank = 1 OR RowStatus = 'I'   
                )            
                SELECT  ParticipantId,
                        SequenceNumber,                          
                        CreationDate,  
                        MaintenanceDate,
                        RowStatus,
                        FromDate,
                        ToDate,
                        NMI, 
                        TransmissionNodeIdentifier,
                        DistributionLossFactorCode,
                        Status,
                        FileName               
                FROM Numbered_Rows_S
                WHERE SequenceRank = 1
                order by SequenceNumber,CreationDate
        )

df_silver = spark.sql(f"""SELECT * FROM Silver_temp_{db_tablename} """)

# Changing timestamp columns format from UTC to AEST
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("CreationDate_D", from_utc_timestamp(col("CreationDate"), "Australia/Brisbane"))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("MaintenanceDate_D", from_utc_timestamp(col("MaintenanceDate"), "Australia/Brisbane"))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("FromDate_D", from_utc_timestamp(col("FromDate"), "Australia/Brisbane"))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("ToDate_D", from_utc_timestamp(col("ToDate"), "Australia/Brisbane"))

# Add CDC columns
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("HashKey", sha2(concat_ws("||", "ParticipantId","SequenceNumber"), 256))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("HashDiff", sha2(concat_ws("||", "CreationDate","MaintenanceDate","RowStatus","FromDate","ToDate","NMI","TransmissionNodeIdentifier","DistributionLossFactorCode","Status"), 256))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("NMIHashId", sha2(concat_ws("||", "NMI"), 256))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("CDCLoadDate", to_timestamp(lit(Silver_LoadDate),'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("CDCStartDate", to_timestamp(lit(Silver_LoadDate), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("CDCEndDate", to_timestamp(lit("9999-12-31 23:59:59"), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("CDCCurrentFlag", lit(1))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("CDCOps", lit(1))

# SCD2 logic
# Create a temporary view of the dataframe
df_silver.createOrReplaceTempView("temp_table")

# Use the merge operation to update the target table
spark.sql(f"""
    MERGE INTO {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} t
    USING temp_table s
    ON t.HashKey = s.HashKey AND t.CDCCurrentFlag == true
    WHEN MATCHED AND t.HashDiff <> s.HashDiff THEN
      UPDATE SET t.CDCEndDate = '{Silver_UpdateEndDate}',
                 t.CDCCurrentFlag = false,
                 t.CDCOps = s.CDCOps + 1
    WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
      INSERT (ParticipantId,SequenceNumber,CreationDate,CreationDate_D,MaintenanceDate,MaintenanceDate_D,RowStatus,ValidFrom,ValidFrom_D,ValidTo,ValidTo_D,
              NMI,NMIHashId,TNI,DLFCode,Status,FileName,CDCLoadDate,CDCStartDate,CDCEndDate,CDCOps,CDCCurrentFlag,HashKey,HashDiff)
      VALUES (s.ParticipantId,s.SequenceNumber,s.CreationDate,s.CreationDate_D,s.MaintenanceDate,s.MaintenanceDate_D,s.RowStatus,s.FromDate,s.FromDate_D,s.ToDate,s.ToDate_D,
              s.NMI,s.NMIHashId,s.TransmissionNodeIdentifier,s.DistributionLossFactorCode,s.Status,s.FileName,s.CDCLoadDate,s.CDCStartDate,s.CDCEndDate,s.CDCOps,s.CDCCurrentFlag,s.HashKey,s.HashDiff)
""")

# Use the merge operation to Insert updated record 
spark.sql(f"""
    MERGE INTO {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} t
    USING temp_table s
    ON t.HashKey = s.HashKey AND t.CDCCurrentFlag == true
    WHEN MATCHED AND t.HashDiff <> s.HashDiff THEN
      UPDATE SET t.CDCEndDate = '{Silver_UpdateEndDate}',
                 t.CDCCurrentFlag = false,
                 t.CDCOps = s.CDCOps + 1
    WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
      INSERT (ParticipantId,SequenceNumber,CreationDate,CreationDate_D,MaintenanceDate,MaintenanceDate_D,RowStatus,ValidFrom,ValidFrom_D,ValidTo,ValidTo_D,
              NMI,NMIHashId,TNI,DLFCode,Status,FileName,CDCLoadDate,CDCStartDate,CDCEndDate,CDCOps,CDCCurrentFlag,HashKey,HashDiff)
      VALUES (s.ParticipantId,s.SequenceNumber,s.CreationDate,s.CreationDate_D,s.MaintenanceDate,s.MaintenanceDate_D,s.RowStatus,s.FromDate,s.FromDate_D,s.ToDate,s.ToDate_D,
              s.NMI,s.NMIHashId,s.TransmissionNodeIdentifier,s.DistributionLossFactorCode,s.Status,s.FileName,s.CDCLoadDate,s.CDCStartDate,s.CDCEndDate,s.CDCOps,s.CDCCurrentFlag,s.HashKey,s.HashDiff)

#Row count parameters
Silver_Insert_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 1 """).collect()[0][0]
Silver_Update_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 2 """).collect()[0][0]
Silver_Delete_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 0 """).collect()[0][0]
Silver_TotalRowCount_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename}""").collect()[0][0]
Silver_ActiveRecord_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCCurrentFlag = true """).collect()[0][0]

#Row calculation
Silver_Update = Silver_Update_Post - Silver_Update_Pre
Silver_Insert = (Silver_Insert_Post - Silver_Insert_Pre) + Silver_Update
Silver_Delete = Silver_Delete_Post - Silver_Delete_Pre
Silver_ActiveRows = Silver_ActiveRecord_Post 
Silver_TotalRows = Silver_TotalRowCount_Post

print(Silver_Update)
print(Silver_Insert)
print(Silver_Delete)
print(Silver_ActiveRows)
print(Silver_TotalRows)

#Create dataframe to insert log to controldb
log_data = [(db_notebookname,db_tablename,Silver_LoadDate,Silver_Insert,Silver_Update,Silver_Delete,Silver_ActiveRows,Silver_TotalRows)]
print(log_data)
log_columns = ['PIPELINE_NAME', 'TABLE_NAME', 'INGEST_DATETIME', 'INSERT','UPDATE','DELETE','ACTIVE_ROWS','TOTAL_ROWS']
df_log = spark.createDataFrame(log_data, log_columns)

#Write df_log to logging table in controldb
db_port = 1433
linked_service_name = "LS_SQL_ELTFrameworkDB"
linkedServiceProperties = json.loads(mssparkutils.credentials.getPropertiesAll(linked_service_name))
sql_server_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Endpoint')
db_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Database')
access_token = mssparkutils.credentials.getConnectionStringOrCreds(linked_service_name)
write_table_name = "[CTL].[CFG_INGESTION_LOGS]"

try:
    df_log.write.format("jdbc") \
        .option("url", "jdbc:sqlserver://%s:%s" % (sql_server_name, db_port)) \
        .option("dbtable", write_table_name) \
        .option("accessToken", access_token) \
        .option("encrypt", "true") \
        .option("databaseName", db_name) \
        .option("hostNameInCertificate", "*.database.windows.net") \
        .mode("append") \
        .save()
except ValueError as error :
    print("MSSQL Connector write failed", error)

print("MSSQL Connector write(append) succeeded  ")
#  Table: **nmi_loss_factor**: END
#  Table: **nmi_nmi_relationship**: START

#Set table name
db_tablename="nmi_nmi_relationship"
Bronze_tablename="msats_nmi_data"
Bronze_notebookname="aemo_bronze"

#Create Bronze Table
spark.sql(f"""CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS {lake_db_name};""")
spark.sql(f"""
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename}
(
	ParticipantId STRING,
	SequenceNumber INT,
    NMI STRING,
	NMIHashId STRING,
    ParentNMI STRING,
	ValidFrom TIMESTAMP,
    ValidFrom_D TIMESTAMP,
	ValidTo TIMESTAMP,
    ValidTo_D TIMESTAMP,
    RowStatus STRING,
    Status STRING,
	ENID STRING,
    CDCLoadDate TIMESTAMP,
    CDCStartDate TIMESTAMP,
    CDCEndDate TIMESTAMP,
    CDCOps INT,
    CDCCurrentFlag BOOLEAN,
    HashKey STRING,
    HashDiff STRING  
)
USING delta
LOCATION 'abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{destination_path}/{db_tablename}'

# Row count parameters
Silver_Insert_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 1 """).collect()[0][0]
Silver_Update_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 2 """).collect()[0][0]
Silver_Delete_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 0 """).collect()[0][0]

# Create a temporary view
spark.sql(f"""
    CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW 
       Silver_temp_{db_tablename}
    AS
        (
            WITH Numbered_Rows_R AS (
                SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ParticipantId,NMI,FromDate ORDER BY CreationDate desc) AS RecordRank
                FROM {Bronze_notebookname}.{Bronze_tablename}
                WHERE CDCLoadDate > '{silver_loaddate}'
                )
                , Numbered_Rows_S AS (
                    SELECT  *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ParticipantId,SequenceNumber ORDER BY MaintenanceDate) AS SequenceRank
                    FROM Numbered_Rows_R
                    WHERE RecordRank = 1 OR RowStatus = 'I'   
                )            
                SELECT  
                        ParticipantId,
	                    SequenceNumber,                
                        NMI,
                        FromDate,
                        ToDate,
                        ParentEmbeddedNetworkIdentifier AS ParentENID,
                        ChildEmbeddedNetworkIdentifier AS ChildENID,
                        RowStatus,
                        Status
                FROM Numbered_Rows_S
                WHERE SequenceRank = 1
                order by SequenceNumber,CreationDate
        )
df_silver = spark.sql(f"""SELECT * FROM Silver_temp_{db_tablename} """)

#Create separate dataframes for child and parent NMIs
df_child  = df_silver.filter("ChildENID IS NOT NULL").alias("df_child").select('ParticipantId', 'SequenceNumber',col('NMI').alias("ChildNMI"),
                                                                        'FromDate','ToDate','RowStatus','Status',col('ChildENID').alias("c_enid"))
df_parent = df_silver.filter("ParentENID IS NOT NULL").alias("df_parent").select(col('NMI').alias("ParentNMI"),col('ParentENID').alias("p_enid"))

# Join child and parent dataframes using embedded network id
df_join_enid = df_child.join(
    df_parent,
    [df_child.c_enid == df_parent.p_enid],
    'inner'
).select(
     "ParticipantId","SequenceNumber","ChildNMI","ParentNMI","FromDate","ToDate","RowStatus","Status","c_enid"
# Remove duplicates
df_silver_final = df_join_enid.dropDuplicates()

# Changing timestamp columns format from UTC to AEST
df_silver_final = df_silver_final.withColumn("FromDate_D", from_utc_timestamp(col("FromDate"), "Australia/Brisbane"))
df_silver_final = df_silver_final.withColumn("ToDate_D", from_utc_timestamp(col("ToDate"), "Australia/Brisbane"))

# Add CDC columns
df_silver_final = df_silver_final.withColumn("HashKey", sha2(concat_ws("||", "ParticipantId","SequenceNumber"), 256))
df_silver_final = df_silver_final.withColumn("HashDiff", sha2(concat_ws("||",  "ChildNMI","ParentNMI","FromDate","ToDate","RowStatus","Status","c_enid"), 256))
df_silver_final = df_silver_final.withColumn("NMIHashId", sha2(concat_ws("||", "ChildNMI"), 256))
df_silver_final = df_silver_final.withColumn("CDCLoadDate", to_timestamp(lit(Silver_LoadDate),'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
df_silver_final = df_silver_final.withColumn("CDCStartDate", to_timestamp(lit(Silver_LoadDate), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
df_silver_final = df_silver_final.withColumn("CDCEndDate", to_timestamp(lit("9999-12-31 23:59:59"), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
df_silver_final = df_silver_final.withColumn("CDCCurrentFlag", lit(1))
df_silver_final = df_silver_final.withColumn("CDCOps", lit(1))

# SCD2 logic
# Create a temporary view of the dataframe
df_silver_final.createOrReplaceTempView("temp_table")

# Use the merge operation to update the target table
spark.sql(f"""
    MERGE INTO {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} t
    USING temp_table s
    ON t.HashKey = s.HashKey AND t.CDCCurrentFlag == true
    WHEN MATCHED AND t.HashDiff <> s.HashDiff THEN
      UPDATE SET t.CDCEndDate = '{Silver_UpdateEndDate}',
                 t.CDCCurrentFlag = false,
                 t.CDCOps = s.CDCOps + 1
    WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
      INSERT (ParticipantId,SequenceNumber,NMI,NMIHashId,ParentNMI,ValidFrom,ValidFrom_D,ValidTo,ValidTo_D,RowStatus,Status,ENID,
              CDCLoadDate,CDCStartDate,CDCEndDate,CDCOps,CDCCurrentFlag,HashKey,HashDiff)
      VALUES (s.ParticipantId,s.SequenceNumber,s.ChildNMI,s.NMIHashId,s.ParentNMI,s.FromDate,s.FromDate_D,s.ToDate,s.ToDate_D,s.RowStatus,s.Status,s.c_enid,
              s.CDCLoadDate,s.CDCStartDate,s.CDCEndDate,s.CDCOps,s.CDCCurrentFlag,s.HashKey,s.HashDiff)
""")

# Use the merge operation to Insert updated record 
spark.sql(f"""
    MERGE INTO {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} t
    USING temp_table s
    ON t.HashKey = s.HashKey AND t.CDCCurrentFlag == true
    WHEN MATCHED AND t.HashDiff <> s.HashDiff THEN
      UPDATE SET t.CDCEndDate = '{Silver_UpdateEndDate}',
                 t.CDCCurrentFlag = false,
                 t.CDCOps = s.CDCOps + 1
    WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
      INSERT (ParticipantId,SequenceNumber,NMI,NMIHashId,ParentNMI,ValidFrom,ValidFrom_D,ValidTo,ValidTo_D,RowStatus,Status,ENID,
              CDCLoadDate,CDCStartDate,CDCEndDate,CDCOps,CDCCurrentFlag,HashKey,HashDiff)
      VALUES (s.ParticipantId,s.SequenceNumber,s.ChildNMI,s.NMIHashId,s.ParentNMI,s.FromDate,s.FromDate_D,s.ToDate,s.ToDate_D,s.RowStatus,s.Status,s.c_enid,
              s.CDCLoadDate,s.CDCStartDate,s.CDCEndDate,s.CDCOps,s.CDCCurrentFlag,s.HashKey,s.HashDiff)

#Row count parameters
Silver_Insert_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 1 """).collect()[0][0]
Silver_Update_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 2 """).collect()[0][0]
Silver_Delete_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 0 """).collect()[0][0]
Silver_TotalRowCount_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename}""").collect()[0][0]
Silver_ActiveRecord_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCCurrentFlag = true """).collect()[0][0]

#Row calculation
Silver_Update = Silver_Update_Post - Silver_Update_Pre
Silver_Insert = (Silver_Insert_Post - Silver_Insert_Pre) + Silver_Update
Silver_Delete = Silver_Delete_Post - Silver_Delete_Pre
Silver_ActiveRows = Silver_ActiveRecord_Post 
Silver_TotalRows = Silver_TotalRowCount_Post

print(Silver_Update)
print(Silver_Insert)
print(Silver_Delete)
print(Silver_ActiveRows)
print(Silver_TotalRows)

#Create dataframe to insert log to controldb
log_data = [(db_notebookname,db_tablename,Silver_LoadDate,Silver_Insert,Silver_Update,Silver_Delete,Silver_ActiveRows,Silver_TotalRows)]
#print(log_data)
log_columns = ['PIPELINE_NAME', 'TABLE_NAME', 'INGEST_DATETIME', 'INSERT','UPDATE','DELETE','ACTIVE_ROWS','TOTAL_ROWS']
df_log = spark.createDataFrame(log_data, log_columns)

#Write df_log to logging table in controldb
db_port = 1433
linked_service_name = "LS_SQL_ELTFrameworkDB"
linkedServiceProperties = json.loads(mssparkutils.credentials.getPropertiesAll(linked_service_name))
sql_server_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Endpoint')
db_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Database')
access_token = mssparkutils.credentials.getConnectionStringOrCreds(linked_service_name)
write_table_name = "[CTL].[CFG_INGESTION_LOGS]"

try:
    df_log.write.format("jdbc") \
        .option("url", "jdbc:sqlserver://%s:%s" % (sql_server_name, db_port)) \
        .option("dbtable", write_table_name) \
        .option("accessToken", access_token) \
        .option("encrypt", "true") \
        .option("databaseName", db_name) \
        .option("hostNameInCertificate", "*.database.windows.net") \
        .mode("append") \
        .save()
except ValueError as error :
    print("MSSQL Connector write failed", error)

print("MSSQL Connector write(append) succeeded  ")

#  Table: **NMI**: START

#Set table name
db_tablename="NMI"
Bronze_tablename="msats_nmi_role"
Bronze_notebookname="aemo_bronze"

#Create Bronze Table
spark.sql(f"""CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS {lake_db_name};""")
spark.sql(f"""
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename}
(
	ParticipantId STRING,
	SequenceNumber INT,
	NMI STRING,
	NMIHashId STRING,
	CreationDate TIMESTAMP,
	CreationDate_D TIMESTAMP,
	MaintenanceDate TIMESTAMP,
	MaintenanceDate_D TIMESTAMP,
	NMIRole STRING,	
	RowStatus STRING,
	Party STRING,
	ValidFrom TIMESTAMP,
	ValidFrom_D TIMESTAMP,
	ValidTo TIMESTAMP,
	ValidTo_D TIMESTAMP,
	FileName STRING,
    CDCLoadDate TIMESTAMP,
    CDCStartDate TIMESTAMP,
    CDCEndDate TIMESTAMP,
    CDCOps INT,
    CDCCurrentFlag BOOLEAN,
    HashKey STRING,
    HashDiff STRING  
)
USING delta
LOCATION 'abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{destination_path}/{db_tablename}'

# Row count parameters
Silver_Insert_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 1 """).collect()[0][0]
Silver_Update_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 2 """).collect()[0][0]
Silver_Delete_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 0 """).collect()[0][0]

# Create a temporary view
spark.sql(f"""
    CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW 
       Silver_temp_{db_tablename}
    AS
        (
            WITH Numbered_Rows_R AS (
                SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ParticipantId,NMI,FromDate,Role ORDER BY CreationDate desc) AS RecordRank
                FROM {Bronze_notebookname}.{Bronze_tablename}
                WHERE CDCLoadDate > '{silver_loaddate}'
                )
                , Numbered_Rows_S AS (
                    SELECT  *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ParticipantId,SequenceNumber ORDER BY MaintenanceDate) AS SequenceRank
                    FROM Numbered_Rows_R
                    WHERE RecordRank = 1 OR RowStatus = 'I'   
                )            
                SELECT  
                        ParticipantId,
	                    SequenceNumber,                
                        NMI,
                        CreationDate,  
                        MaintenanceDate,
                        Role,
                        RowStatus,
                        Party,
                        FromDate,
                        ToDate,
                        FileName   
                FROM Numbered_Rows_S
                WHERE SequenceRank = 1
                order by SequenceNumber,CreationDate
        )

df_silver = spark.sql(f"""SELECT * FROM Silver_temp_{db_tablename} """)

# Changing timestamp columns format from UTC to AEST
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("CreationDate_D", from_utc_timestamp(col("CreationDate"), "Australia/Brisbane"))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("MaintenanceDate_D", from_utc_timestamp(col("MaintenanceDate"), "Australia/Brisbane"))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("FromDate_D", from_utc_timestamp(col("FromDate"), "Australia/Brisbane"))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("ToDate_D", from_utc_timestamp(col("ToDate"), "Australia/Brisbane"))

# Add CDC columns
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("HashKey", sha2(concat_ws("||", "ParticipantId","SequenceNumber"), 256))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("HashDiff", sha2(concat_ws("||", "NMI","CreationDate","MaintenanceDate","Role","RowStatus","Party","FromDate","ToDate"), 256))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("NMIHashId", sha2(concat_ws("||", "NMI"), 256))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("CDCLoadDate", to_timestamp(lit(Silver_LoadDate),'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("CDCStartDate", to_timestamp(lit(Silver_LoadDate), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("CDCEndDate", to_timestamp(lit("9999-12-31 23:59:59"), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("CDCCurrentFlag", lit(1))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("CDCOps", lit(1))

# Row count parameters
Silver_Insert_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 1 """).collect()[0][0]
Silver_Update_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 2 """).collect()[0][0]
Silver_Delete_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 0 """).collect()[0][0]

# SCD2 logic
# Create a temporary view of the dataframe
df_silver.createOrReplaceTempView("temp_table")

# Use the merge operation to update the target table
spark.sql(f"""
    MERGE INTO {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} t
    USING temp_table s
    ON t.HashKey = s.HashKey AND t.CDCCurrentFlag == true
    WHEN MATCHED AND t.HashDiff <> s.HashDiff THEN
      UPDATE SET t.CDCEndDate = '{Silver_UpdateEndDate}',
                 t.CDCCurrentFlag = false,
                 t.CDCOps = s.CDCOps + 1
    WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
      INSERT (ParticipantId,SequenceNumber,CreationDate,CreationDate_D,MaintenanceDate,MaintenanceDate_D,RowStatus,ValidFrom,ValidFrom_D,ValidTo,ValidTo_D,NMI,NMIHashId,Party,NMIRole,FileName,
              CDCLoadDate,CDCStartDate,CDCEndDate,CDCOps,CDCCurrentFlag,HashKey,HashDiff)
      VALUES (s.ParticipantId,s.SequenceNumber,s.CreationDate,s.CreationDate_D,s.MaintenanceDate,s.MaintenanceDate_D,s.RowStatus,s.FromDate,s.FromDate_D,s.ToDate,s.ToDate_D,s.NMI,s.NMIHashId,s.Party,s.Role,s.FileName,
              s.CDCLoadDate,s.CDCStartDate,s.CDCEndDate,s.CDCOps,s.CDCCurrentFlag,s.HashKey,s.HashDiff)
""")

# Use the merge operation to Insert updated record 
spark.sql(f"""
    MERGE INTO {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} t
    USING temp_table s
    ON t.HashKey = s.HashKey AND t.CDCCurrentFlag == true
    WHEN MATCHED AND t.HashDiff <> s.HashDiff THEN
      UPDATE SET t.CDCEndDate = '{Silver_UpdateEndDate}',
                 t.CDCCurrentFlag = false,
                 t.CDCOps = s.CDCOps + 1
    WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
      INSERT (ParticipantId,SequenceNumber,CreationDate,CreationDate_D,MaintenanceDate,MaintenanceDate_D,RowStatus,ValidFrom,ValidFrom_D,ValidTo,ValidTo_D,NMI,NMIHashId,Party,NMIRole,FileName,
              CDCLoadDate,CDCStartDate,CDCEndDate,CDCOps,CDCCurrentFlag,HashKey,HashDiff)
      VALUES (s.ParticipantId,s.SequenceNumber,s.CreationDate,s.CreationDate_D,s.MaintenanceDate,s.MaintenanceDate_D,s.RowStatus,s.FromDate,s.FromDate_D,s.ToDate,s.ToDate_D,s.NMI,s.NMIHashId,s.Party,s.Role,s.FileName,
              s.CDCLoadDate,s.CDCStartDate,s.CDCEndDate,s.CDCOps,s.CDCCurrentFlag,s.HashKey,s.HashDiff)

#Row count parameters
Silver_Insert_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 1 """).collect()[0][0]
Silver_Update_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 2 """).collect()[0][0]
Silver_Delete_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 0 """).collect()[0][0]
Silver_TotalRowCount_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename}""").collect()[0][0]
Silver_ActiveRecord_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCCurrentFlag = true """).collect()[0][0]

#Row calculation
Silver_Update = Silver_Update_Post - Silver_Update_Pre
Silver_Insert = (Silver_Insert_Post - Silver_Insert_Pre) + Silver_Update
Silver_Delete = Silver_Delete_Post - Silver_Delete_Pre
Silver_ActiveRows = Silver_ActiveRecord_Post 
Silver_TotalRows = Silver_TotalRowCount_Post

print(Silver_Update)
print(Silver_Insert)
print(Silver_Delete)
print(Silver_ActiveRows)
print(Silver_TotalRows)

#Create dataframe to insert log to controldb
log_data = [(db_notebookname,db_tablename,Silver_LoadDate,Silver_Insert,Silver_Update,Silver_Delete,Silver_ActiveRows,Silver_TotalRows)]
print(log_data)
log_columns = ['PIPELINE_NAME', 'TABLE_NAME', 'INGEST_DATETIME', 'INSERT','UPDATE','DELETE','ACTIVE_ROWS','TOTAL_ROWS']
df_log = spark.createDataFrame(log_data, log_columns)

#Write df_log to logging table in controldb
db_port = 1433
linked_service_name = "LS_SQL_ELTFrameworkDB"
linkedServiceProperties = json.loads(mssparkutils.credentials.getPropertiesAll(linked_service_name))
sql_server_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Endpoint')
db_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Database')
access_token = mssparkutils.credentials.getConnectionStringOrCreds(linked_service_name)
write_table_name = "[CTL].[CFG_INGESTION_LOGS]"

try:
    df_log.write.format("jdbc") \
        .option("url", "jdbc:sqlserver://%s:%s" % (sql_server_name, db_port)) \
        .option("dbtable", write_table_name) \
        .option("accessToken", access_token) \
        .option("encrypt", "true") \
        .option("databaseName", db_name) \
        .option("hostNameInCertificate", "*.database.windows.net") \
        .mode("append") \
        .save()
except ValueError as error :
    print("MSSQL Connector write failed", error)

print("MSSQL Connector write(append) succeeded  ")

else:

if msats_nmi_location_23516:
    # Create a temporary view

    spark.sql(f"""
    CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW Silver_temp_{db_tablename}
    AS
    (
        WITH DimDate AS (
            SELECT Date
            FROM dimtables_gold.dimdate
        ),

        Meters_Ranked AS (
            SELECT 
                m.ParticipantId,
                m.SequenceNumber,
                m.CreationDate,
                m.MaintenanceDate,
                m.RowStatus,
                m.SerialNumber,
                to_date(m.FromDate) AS FromDate,
                to_date(m.ToDate)   AS ToDate,
                m.NMI,
                m.Latitude,
                m.Longitude,
                ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
                    PARTITION BY m.ParticipantId, m.NMI, to_date(m.FromDate)
                    ORDER BY m.CreationDate DESC
                ) AS RecordRank
            FROM {Bronze_notebookname}.{Bronze_tablename1} m
            WHERE m.RowStatus = "A"
            AND m.CDCLoadDate > '{silver_loaddate}'
        ),
            
        Meters_Filtered AS (
            SELECT 
                *,
                ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
                    PARTITION BY ParticipantId, SequenceNumber
                    ORDER BY MaintenanceDate
                ) AS SequenceRank
            FROM Meters_Ranked
            WHERE RecordRank = 1
        ),
        
        Meters_Final AS (
            SELECT
                ParticipantId,
                RowStatus,
                SerialNumber,
                FromDate,
                ToDate,
                NMI,
                Latitude,
                Longitude
            FROM Meters_Filtered
            WHERE SequenceRank = 1
        ),

        Data_Ranked AS (
            SELECT 
                d.ParticipantId,
                d.SequenceNumber,
                d.CreationDate,
                d.MaintenanceDate,
                d.RowStatus,
                to_date(d.FromDate) AS FromDate,
                to_date(d.ToDate)   AS ToDate,
                d.NMI,
                d.JurisdictionCode,
                d.BuildingName,
                d.LotNumber,
                d.FlatNumber,
                d.FlatType,
                d.FloorNumber,
                d.FloorType,
                d.HouseNumber,
                d.HouseNumberSuffix,
                d.HouseNumberTo,
                d.HouseNumberToSuffix,
                d.StreetName,
                d.StreetType,
                d.StreetSuffix,
                d.Suburb,
                d.LocationDescriptor,
                d.State,
                d.PostCode,
                ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
                    PARTITION BY d.ParticipantId, d.NMI, to_date(d.FromDate)
                    ORDER BY d.CreationDate DESC
                ) AS RecordRank
            FROM {Bronze_notebookname}.{Bronze_tablename2} d
            WHERE d.RowStatus = "A" 
            AND d.CDCLoadDate > '{silver_loaddate}'
        ),
        
        Data_Filtered AS (
            SELECT 
                *,
                ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
                    PARTITION BY ParticipantId, SequenceNumber
                    ORDER BY MaintenanceDate
                ) AS SequenceRank
            FROM Data_Ranked
            WHERE RecordRank = 1
        ),
        
        Data_Final AS (
            SELECT
                ParticipantId,
                RowStatus,
                FromDate,
                ToDate,
                NMI,
                JurisdictionCode,
                BuildingName,
                LotNumber,
                FlatNumber,
                FlatType,
                FloorNumber,
                FloorType,
                HouseNumber,
                HouseNumberSuffix,
                HouseNumberTo,
                HouseNumberToSuffix,
                StreetName,
                StreetType,
                StreetSuffix,
                Suburb,
                LocationDescriptor,
                State,
                PostCode
            FROM Data_Filtered
            WHERE SequenceRank = 1
        ),

        -- Join with DimDate to convert period based records into daily grain records
        Meters_Date AS (
            SELECT
                dd.Date,
                m.*
            FROM DimDate dd
            INNER JOIN Meters_Final m
                ON dd.Date BETWEEN m.FromDate AND m.ToDate
        ),

        Data_Date AS (
            SELECT
                dd.Date,
                d.*
            FROM DimDate dd
            INNER JOIN Data_Final d
                ON dd.Date BETWEEN d.FromDate AND d.ToDate
        ),

        Joined_All AS (
            SELECT
                COALESCE(m.ParticipantId, d.ParticipantId) AS ParticipantId,
                COALESCE(m.RowStatus, d.RowStatus) AS RowStatus,
                COALESCE(m.NMI, d.NMI) AS NMI,
                m.Latitude,
                m.Longitude,
                m.SerialNumber,
                d.JurisdictionCode,
                d.BuildingName,
                d.LotNumber,
                d.FlatNumber,
                d.FlatType,
                d.FloorNumber,
                d.FloorType,
                d.HouseNumber,
                d.HouseNumberSuffix,
                d.HouseNumberTo,
                d.HouseNumberToSuffix,
                d.StreetName,
                d.StreetType,
                d.StreetSuffix,
                d.Suburb,
                d.LocationDescriptor,
                d.State,
                d.PostCode,
                COALESCE(m.Date, d.Date) AS Date
            FROM Meters_Date m
            FULL OUTER JOIN Data_Date d
                ON m.ParticipantId = d.ParticipantId
            AND m.NMI = d.NMI
            AND m.Date = d.Date
        ),

    Final_Grouped AS (
        SELECT
            ParticipantId,
            NMI,
            RowStatus,
            SerialNumber,
            JurisdictionCode,
            BuildingName,
            LotNumber,
            FlatNumber,
            FlatType,
            FloorNumber,
            FloorType,
            HouseNumber,
            HouseNumberSuffix,
            HouseNumberTo,
            HouseNumberToSuffix,
            StreetName,
            StreetType,
            StreetSuffix,
            Suburb,
            LocationDescriptor,
            State,
            PostCode,
            Latitude,
            Longitude,
            MIN(Date) AS FromDate,
            MAX(Date) AS ToDate
        FROM Joined_All
        GROUP BY 
            ParticipantId,
            NMI,
            RowStatus,
            SerialNumber,
            JurisdictionCode,
            BuildingName,
            LotNumber,
            FlatNumber,
            FlatType,
            FloorNumber,
            FloorType,
            HouseNumber,
            HouseNumberSuffix,
            HouseNumberTo,
            HouseNumberToSuffix,
            StreetName,
            StreetType,
            StreetSuffix,
            Suburb,
            LocationDescriptor,
            State,
            PostCode,
            Latitude,
            Longitude
    )

        SELECT
            ParticipantId,
            FromDate,
            ToDate,
            NMI,
            SerialNumber,
            JurisdictionCode,
            BuildingName,
            LotNumber,
            FlatNumber,
            FlatType,
            FloorNumber,
            FloorType,
            HouseNumber,
            HouseNumberSuffix,
            HouseNumberTo,
            HouseNumberToSuffix,
            StreetName,
            StreetType,
            StreetSuffix,
            Suburb,
            LocationDescriptor,
            State,
            PostCode,
            Latitude,
            Longitude
        FROM Final_Grouped
        ORDER BY ParticipantId, NMI
    )
    """)

else:
    print("Feature Flag turned off, new code not allowed to run.")
